title: Index cohort set #4 — aggregate stats (SEER*Explorer, GLOBOCAN, CDC WONDER)
context: Aggregate cancer incidence, mortality, and outcome statistics are a distinct entry type from patient cohorts. SEER*Explorer (NCI), GLOBOCAN (IARC/WHO), and CDC WONDER are the primary sources. These are indexed as entryType:population-statistics with accessTier:OPEN-AGGREGATE. Key guardrails: SEER research microdata (which requires a signed agreement) is CONTROLLED and out of scope — only the SEER*Explorer open aggregate layer is indexed. GLOBOCAN/IARC is NOT simply open: it carries attribution requirements and use conditions that must be verified, not assumed. CDC WONDER is US government public domain. Each source requires gate-003 applied and license/terms verified from primary source text. Depends on triage-009 and ci-linter-014.
objective: Index SEER*Explorer open aggregate, GLOBOCAN, and CDC WONDER as entryType:population-statistics records with accessTier:OPEN-AGGREGATE, terms verified from primary source text (not assumed), SEER research microdata explicitly excluded, and GLOBOCAN attribution requirements cited — with gate artifacts, CI green, and fully cited fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Each aggregate stats source (SEER*Explorer open aggregate, GLOBOCAN, CDC WONDER) is indexed as entryType:population-statistics; aggregateCounts shape uses statisticalUniverse (not patients or cellLines).
accessTier:OPEN-AGGREGATE for all three sources; this is verified from primary source text, not assumed.
GLOBOCAN/IARC terms are verified from the GLOBOCAN/Cancer-Today terms page (attribution requirements and use conditions noted and cited); not assumed to be open.

SEER research microdata is explicitly EXCLUDED (signed agreement / controlled) and noted in the SEER record as out of scope with a pointer to the exclusion register; only the SEER*Explorer open aggregate is indexed.
CDC WONDER is confirmed US-government public domain; cited from primary source.
Each record gate-passed (gate-003 artifact committed); every field has fieldProvenance; completeness score ≥ 90/100.
License snapshots recorded; CI green (ci-linter-014 passing); outputLicense CC-BY-4.0; DCO signed-off.
resources: CDC WONDER (https://wonder.cdc.gov/); CDC data use policies
output: Committed catalog records (catalog/*.json) for SEER*Explorer open aggregate, GLOBOCAN, and CDC WONDER as population-statistics entries with gate artifacts, fully cited, schema-valid, CI-green, licensed CC-BY-4.0.
